report.summary: Standup v6 ~16:06 CET — 5 agents ran since v5 (15:11); BTC reserve + tokenized-treasuries now LIVE (288+ pages); TON + crypto options guides queued; build 1b4a15e still broken (5h+); rate limiting 0/6 unresolved; Sprint 58 not started; all 6 agents ran this cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v5 (~15:11 CET)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED: /learn/bitcoin-strategic-reserve-guide + /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 promoted via publish-v3 (15:19). Site now at 288+ pages in PUBLISHED_PAGES. PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared of those 2 items.

📋 NEW IN QUEUE: /learn/ton-blockchain-telegram-mini-apps-guide-2026 + /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide-2026 added from build-v2 (15:27). Both ~2,400–2,600 words with Article+FAQPage structured data. PUBLISH_QUEUE back to 2 items.

⚙️ Build-v2 shipped OptionsPayoffCalculator.tsx — interactive SVG payoff chart (call/put toggle, strike/premium/spot sliders, real-time P&L + breakeven). Highest-fidelity interactive component built to date. TON guide includes Telegram Mini Apps distribution thesis (950M MAU funnel) and ecosystem table.

🎨 Design (15:37): ARIA accessibility fixes on portfolio-tracker + notifications pages; 3 OG images created (og-daily-challenge.svg, og-portfolio-live.svg, og-streak.svg). 4 OG gaps remain (xp-attestation, referral, share, notifications).

📣 Community-v8 (15:50): 5 social posts drafted (BTC reserve thread × 8, tokenized-treasuries, GENIUS Act, Sonic, meme launchpads); 2 new SVG social cards saved to /public/; full Thursday newsletter section drafted. Posting schedule set: Sunday PM BTC reserve thread → Monday tokenized-treasuries → Tuesday GENIUS Act → Wednesday Sonic + Meme Launchpads → Thursday newsletter.
🔍 GSC Organic Window: Day 15 (14–21 day window). Organic signals could arrive any time today or tomorrow. All analytics still projection-based — no impressions or clicks confirmed yet.

🔴 BUILD ERROR PERSISTS: 1b4a15e 'use client' + metadata conflict unresolved 5h+. EOD-v3 (15:55) confirms production running on Hxo4eH166 (redeploy chain from d3bce36) — Sprint 59 ecosystem/courses routes still not live.
🔴 RATE LIMITING: 0/6 API routes protected per EOD-v3 direct code inspection. rate-limiter.ts exists but unwired. Critical as GSC organic signals are imminent.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/bitcoin-strategic-reserve-guide — US 325K BTC, 5-country sovereign tracker, SovereignBTCTracker.tsx. QA pending (promoted without explicit v6 QA — assume carry-over from v5 queue check).
PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/tokenized-treasuries-guide-2026 — $25.5B RWA market, BlackRock BUIDL/Ondo/Franklin, DeFi integration. QA carry-over from v5.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/ton-blockchain-telegram-mini-apps-guide-2026 — TON sharding, Telegram 950M MAU funnel, DeFi ecosystem table, STON.fi/DeDust/Bemo. Ready to publish.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide-2026 — Calls/puts/Greeks, 5 strategies, DeFi protocols table, OptionsPayoffCalculator.tsx interactive component. Ready to publish.

OPEN 🔴 Build error 1b4a15e — 'use client' + metadata export conflict. EOD-v3 identifies /tools/sentiment-heatmap + /news/market-recap as confirmed conflict files. ~15 min fix. Sprint 59 ecosystem (78 pages) + courses routes blocked from production.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting — 0/6 routes per EOD-v3 code inspection. rate-limiter.ts exists, wiring is a 30-min task. Open since Sprint 38.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel redeploy — Production on Hxo4eH166 (redeploy chain from d3bce36, not Sprint 59 code). Must re-trigger after build fix.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/288 published slugs missing page.tsx — triage needed (scaffolding vs pipeline).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 2/6 routes covered (prices + market-dominance). fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields have no FALLBACK_DATA.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 TS errors: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 JSX errors) + structured-data.examples.ts (8 JSX errors) — non-blocking but accumulating debt.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked; Sprint 58 merges gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 Vercel Pro billing — ~9 days until trial expires. Action required at vercel.com/account/billing.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% — DeFiLlama Live API (Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend queued but no commits landed.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix build error 1b4a15e NOW. This is a copy-paste fix (~15 min) that has been resolved 3× in prior sprints. The pattern is known: add 'use client' at top of /tools/sentiment-heatmap/page.tsx and /news/market-recap/page.tsx and remove any metadata exports from those files. Fixing this unblocks: Sprint 59's 78 ecosystem + courses pages reaching production, the Vercel redeploy that includes all committed changes, and clearing the path for Sprint 58 merges. Assign: Programmer immediately. This is the single highest-leverage action available right now.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiting across all 6 API routes (30-min task). rate-limiter.ts is built — it just needs to be imported and called at the top of each route handler. EOD-v3 confirmed 0/6 are protected. With GSC Day 15 and organic signals imminent, any Google Discover spike or viral share on the newly-published BTC reserve or tokenized-treasuries pages could hit upstream API limits hard. Simultaneously, add FALLBACK_DATA constants to the 4 remaining unprotected routes (fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields). Assign: Data Engineer or Programmer — this is the reliability gate for organic traffic.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish TON + crypto options from PUBLISH_QUEUE, then begin Sprint 58 DeFiLlama wire-up. Both guides are QA-ready in queue. Publish them before the next cycle. Then: the site's highest-traffic tool (Bloomberg Screener V3) is still running mock data 15 days post-launch. Once rate limiting is wired (Priority 2), Data Engineer should begin DeFiLlama live feed integration — this is the Sprint 58 centerpiece that transforms Screener V3 from prototype to genuine product and is the strongest possible signal to Google's quality evaluators as organic traffic begins.
